title: SkyPlebbin
description: Friendly Vanilla+ SkyBlock modpack with quests & guide books, technology, exploration, bosses, customization, and more! Experience an original SkyBlock style with unique progression and advanced technologies.
body:
SkyPlebbin - A Next-Level SkyBlock Modpack for Fabric!

Dive into the extraordinary with SkyPlebbin, the Minecraft modpack that achieves the high standard of the SkyBlock genre! Brace yourself for an unparalleled adventure featuring original and custom progression, advanced technologies, thrilling exploration, formidable bosses, custom mobs, unique structures, and a whole lot more. This questing modpack cranks the excitement up with 9 chapters of progression, complete with Patchouli guide books which provide valuable hints and tips. Vanilla-friendly and crafted for players of all skill levels, it's the perfect way to enjoy Minecraft!

Embark on the Voidworld Odyssey

The action kicks off in the Voidworld dimension, where players stake their claim on a personal sky island. Forge your path through crafting, cooking, chopping, composting, mashing, smelting, smoking, and even fermenting as you ascend from the Void to the Nether, and beyond to the Overworld and End dimensions. Prepare for a groundbreaking experience as you pioneer fantastic and powerful technologies that will leave your mark on the Minecraft universe.

A Universe of Mods

SkyPlebbin introduces a galaxy of custom items and blocks, reshaping the traditional Skyblock progression. Immerse yourself in popular mods like Tech Reborn, Farmer's Delight, Mythic Mobs, Datapack Portals, Chipped, Handcrafted, Magic Combat Wands, Supplementaries, and Lamb Dynamic Lights. Elevate your gameplay with essential mods like Patchouli, Carry On, Jade, JourneyMap, Roughly Enough Items (REI), AppleSkin, Fabric Waystones, and a myriad more including key SkyBlock-enabling mods like Accelerated Decay and Squat Grow. Supercharge your exploration with new biomes and structures from additional top mods like Towns and Towers, Underground Jungle, Amplified Nether, Immersive Structures, Regions Unexplored, and many more. Last but not least enjoy a variety of mob variations and other vanilla+ game enhancing content from superb mods like Creeper Overhaul, Enderman Overhaul, Guard Villagers, More Mob Variants, Mythic Mounts, and more! With over 100 carefully curated mods, including our very own SkyPlebbin mod, every aspect synergizes mostly seamlessly-ish for a highly enjoyable and rewarding SkyPlebian experience.

Play-Tested Perfection

Fear not, intrepid adventurer! SkyPlebbin has undergone rigorous playtesting to ensure 100% achievable progression without the need for cheats. But hey - /op @p – we won't judge! Get ready to soar to new heights and carve your legacy in the Minecraft cosmos. SkyPlebbin is not just a modpack; it's a revolution of the SkyPlebian masses! Join us on this groundbreaking journey and reach for the stars✨ — your Skyblock saga awaits!

🖥️Recommended RAM: 6-8GB🖥️

Explore 4 Dimensions

Build Powerful Technologies

How To Play

  • Install the SkyPlebbin modpack on Modrinth
  • In the options menu, increase the RAM to 6GB+
  • Run the modpack
    - By running the SkyPlebbin modpack, you agree to download the additional files not distributed in this version from Modrinth
    - This is done on the first run of the pack. After the initial run, restart the modpack in your Modrinth app to start playing SkyPlebbin!
  • From the Minecraft splash screen, click Single Player
  • Give your new world a name, then set your 'allow cheats' preference
  • Finally, click 'Create New World' and enjoy SkyPlebbin!
  • Note: Players will start briefly in the overworld, but are immediately teleported to their sky island in the voidworld.
